@graph.name: DioGen
@graph.description: Precision health genomics. Cross-reference your DNA against blood biomarkers to build a personalised health protocol.

@graph.name: DioGen Complete Protocol
@graph.description: DNA test kit + comprehensive blood panel (75+ biomarkers) + physician-reviewed personalised protocol + 6-month follow-up

acceptedAnswer.text: We collect your saliva for DNA analysis and send you to LabCorp or Quest for a blood panel covering 75+ biomarkers. Our system cross-references your genetic variants against your blood data to generate a personalised protocol.
Your privacy is non-negotiable. DNA processing happens with HIPAA-compliant infrastructure. We never sell your data, never share it with third parties, and you can request full deletion at any time.

Your protocol covers exact supplement recommendations, nutrition adjustments, training modifications, sleep optimization, and drug interaction warnings — all mapped to your genotype with evidence confidence scores.
Every protocol is reviewed by a licensed physician. The analysis is grounded in peer-reviewed research from Nature, The Lancet, Cell, and NEJM.

mainEntity.name: Can I use existing DNA data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. If you already have raw DNA data from 23andMe or AncestryDNA, you can upload it directly.
